blacksmith.description: The Blacksmith provides your armies with first Aid Tent.
blacksmith.name: Blacksmith

capitol.description: The Capitol earns your kingdom 4000 gold per day.
capitol.name: Capitol

castle.description: The Castle adds two arrow towers, fortifies your town's defenses, and doubles base creature growth.
castle.name: Castle

citadel.description: Including a 50% increase to base creature growth, the Citadel adds a keep, and other terrain obstacles, to a town's defenses.
citadel.name: Citadel

cityHall.description: The City Hall allows you to purchase town structures and earns your kingdom 2000 gold per day.
cityHall.name: City Hall

dwellingLvl1.description: The Ethereal Fountain allows you to recruit Sleepwalkers.
dwellingLvl1.name: Ethereal Fountain

dwellingLvl2.description: The Temple of Silent Song allow you to recruit Singing noctras.
dwellingLvl2.name: Temple of Silent Song

dwellingLvl3.description: The Shimmering Tree allows you to recruit Black Harbingers.
dwellingLvl3.name: Shimmering Tree

dwellingLvl4.description: The Portal of Return allows you to recruit Ethereal Guardians.
dwellingLvl4.name: Portal of Return

dwellingLvl5.description: The Star Sanctuary allows you to recruit Star Casters.
dwellingLvl5.name: Star Sanctuary

dwellingLvl5B.description: The Moon Monastery allows you to recruit Sleeping nocshu.
dwellingLvl5B.name: Moon Monastery

dwellingLvl6.description: The Cave of the Damned allow you to recruit Mourners.
dwellingLvl6.name: Cave of the Damned

dwellingLvl7.description: The Palace of Eternity allows you to recruit Night Reapers.
dwellingLvl7.name: Palace of Eternity

dwellingUpLvl1.description: The Ethereal Fountain allows you to recruit Moonnoide.
dwellingUpLvl1.name: Upg. Ethereal Fountain

dwellingUpLvl2.description: The Temple of Silent Song allow you to recruit Warts of noctras.
dwellingUpLvl2.name: Upg. Temple of Silent Song

dwellingUpLvl3.description: The Shimmering Tree allows you to recruit Ancient Harbingers.
dwellingUpLvl3.name: Upg. Shimmering Tree

dwellingUpLvl4.description: The Portal of Return allows you to recruit Eternal Guardians.
dwellingUpLvl4.name: Upg. Portal of Return

dwellingUpLvl5.description: The Star Sanctuary allows you to recruite Star Diviners.
dwellingUpLvl5.name: Upg. Star Sanctuary

dwellingUpLvl5B.description: The Moon Monastery allows you to recruit Nokshu monks.
dwellingUpLvl5B.name: Upg. Moon Monastery

dwellingUpLvl6.description: The Cave of the Damned allow you to recruit Dark Mourners.
dwellingUpLvl6.name: Upg. Cave of the Damned

dwellingUpLvl7.description: The Palace of Eternity allows you to recruit Moon Reapers.
dwellingUpLvl7.name: Upg. Palace of Eternity

fort.description: The Fort provides your town with defensive walls.
fort.name: Fort

grail.description: The Exodus of souls increases the weekly generation of creatures by 50% and provides your kingdom with an additional 5000 gold each day, also allows your heroes to learn spells cast by enemies with a 100% chance.
grail.name: Exodus of souls

horde1.description: The Lighthouse of Souls increases Sleepwalkers production by 9 per week.
horde1.name: Lighthouse of Souls

horde4.description: The Armor of the Fallen increases Ethereal Guardians production by 3 per week.
horde4.name: Armor of the Fallen

horde4Upgr.description: The Armor of the Fallen increases Eternal Guardians production by 3 per week.
horde4Upgr.name: Armor of the Fallen

mageGuild1.description: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
mageGuild1.name: Mage Guild Level 1

mageGuild2.description: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
mageGuild2.name: Mage Guild Level 2

mageGuild3.description: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
mageGuild3.name: Mage Guild Level 3

mageGuild4.description: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
mageGuild4.name: Mage Guild Level 4

mageGuild5.description: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
mageGuild5.name: Mage Guild Level 5

marketplace.description: With the Marketplace, you can buy and sell resources (exchange rates increase with each Marketplace you own).
marketplace.name: Marketplace

resourceSilo.description: The Resource Silo provides you with an additional +1 crystal each day.
resourceSilo.name: Resource Silo

special1.name: Dimensional Gate
special1.description: The Dimensional Gate allows local heroes to learn Reflection secondary skill.

configuration.onVisitedMessage: Your hero has already mastered the lore of the Reflection.

rewards.message: Do you want your hero to master the lore of the Reflection?

onEmpty.message: Your hero attempts to master the lore of the Reflection in vain. Already possessing many skills, your hero is unable to learn anything new.
Your hero attempts to master the lore of the Reflection before realizing they are unable to read them. It appears as though this art is only accessible to locals and competent scholars.

special2.description: Horst's Light increases the maximum health of Cradle creatures by 2.
special2.name: Horst's Light

tavern.description: The Tavern increases morale for troops defending the city.
tavern.name: Tavern

shipyard.name: Shipyard
shipyard.description: The Shipyard allows you to purchase ships.

ship.name: ship
ship.description: Shipyard allows ships to be built.

townHall.description: The Town Hall allows you to purchase town structures and earns your kingdom 1000 gold per day.
townHall.name: Town Hall

villageHall.description: The Village Hall allows you to purchase town structures and earns your kingdom 500 gold per day.
villageHall.name: Village Hall
